companyDescription: Acme Corp is a leading technology company focused on building innovative solutions for the modern web. We've been at the forefront of cloud computing and distributed systems for over a decade.
teamDescription: Join our small, agile engineering team of 8 developers. We work in a collaborative environment where everyone's input is valued. The team is responsible for building and maintaining our core platform.
responsibilities: Design and build scalable APIs using Node.js and TypeScript
Mentor junior engineers and conduct code reviews
Collaborate with product team to define technical requirements
Optimize database queries and improve system performance
Participate in on-call rotation for production systems
perks: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance
Top-tier equipment and home office setup

referrer.name: John Doe
referrer.conversationSummary: John mentioned the team is growing fast and the role has a lot of autonomy. He thinks my background is a strong fit.

pointOfContact.name: Jane Smith
pointOfContact.conversationSummary: Jane is the engineering manager for the platform team. She emphasized the focus on developer experience and clean architecture.
